Hi, I'm Nye County Sheriff Joe McGill. I'm here today to present the facts in reference to the deputy involved shooting that occurred on 112323, Thanksgiving Day.

The suspect is identified as Joshua Reese, 27 years old. Reese is a white male, 5'7", 140 pounds. The NSO employee involved in the shooting is identified as Sergeant Corey Fowl. Sergeant Fowl is a detective sergeant assigned to the General Assignment section. Sergeant Fowl has been employed with the NSO since 2007. Sergeant Fowl was carrying an NSO issued Glock 17, equipped with a Veridian weapon mounted camera. Sergeant Fowl did not have a body camera during this event.
